zh.lifeSummary: King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan是Ithel ap Idwallon of Wales的兒子，於1010年出生在英國威爾斯。他與ferch Cynfyn在英國威爾斯波斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1070年享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan是Ithel ap Idwallon of Wales的儿子，于1010年出生在英国威尔斯。他与ferch Cynfyn在英国威尔斯波斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1070年享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: King
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word for a male monarch, bestowed, especially in America, with a hint of the notion that the bearer would have kingly qualities;  compare  Duke   and   Earl .  In some cases it may be a transferred use of the surname (originally a nickname or an occupational name given to someone who was employed in a royal household). Its frequency among African Americans is no doubt partly attributable to the civil rights leader  Martin Luther King  (  1929–68 ). It is also used as a short form of   Kingsley .

variants.name: Kingsley
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name derived from various places (in Cheshire, Hampshire, Staffordshire) named in Old English as Cyningeslēah ‘king's wood’.

nameMeanings.name: Gwrgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Meath): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Geargáin ‘descendant of Geargán’ or shortened from Mac Geargáin ‘son of Geargán’, a personal name from a diminutive of garg ‘fierce’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: and
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan was born in 1010, in Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Ithel ap Idwallon of Wales. He married ferch Cynfyn in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1070, at the age of 60.

fr.Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales: Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan est né en 1010, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Ithel ap Idwallon of Wales. Il a épousé ferch Cynfyn à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1070, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan wurde 1010 in Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Ithel ap Idwallon of Wales geboren. Er hat in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom ferch Cynfyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1070 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan è nato il nel 1010 nel Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Ithel ap Idwallon of Wales. Lui sposato ferch Cynfyn nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1070, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorganは1010年にイギリスウェールズでIthel ap Idwallon of Walesの息子として生まれた。イギリスウェールズポウイスでferch Cynfynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1070年に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan(은)는 1010년 영국 웨일스에서 Ithel ap Idwallon of Wales의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 ferch Cynfyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1070년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan nasceu em 1010, em Gales, United Kingdom filho de Ithel ap Idwallon of Wales. Ele casou-se com ferch Cynfyn em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1070, com 60 anos.

ro.Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales: Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan родился в 1010 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. Его отца звали Ithel ap Idwallon of Wales. Он женился на женщине по имени ferch Cynfyn в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1070 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: King Gwrgan of Glywysing and Glamorgan nació en 1010, en Gales, Reino Unido como hijo de Ithel ap Idwallon of Wales. Se casó con ferch Cynfyn en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1070, a la edad de 60 años.
